## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Linked Issue

Closes #

## Validation

- [ ] Unit/integration tests added or updated
- [ ] Local validation commands included
- [ ] Benchmark or load evidence attached (if perf-sensitive)

## Operational Notes

- [ ] Metrics impacted documented
- [ ] Alerts or runbook changes documented
- [ ] Rollback plan included

## Documentation Updates

- [ ] `docs/private/09-PROGRESS-LOG.md` updated
- [ ] `docs/10-DECISION-LOG.md` updated (if architectural decision)
- [ ] Relevant docs in `docs/` updated

## Risks

List failure modes and what protects against them.
